# Bhaumic Singh

> Full stack software engineer building web, android, AI, cloud, and product systems with modern tools and practical experimentation.

## Canonical

- Primary site: https://bhaumicsingh.dev
- Full machine-readable context: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/sitemap/xml
- RSS feed: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/rss
- Humans file: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/humans.txt

## Summary

Bhaumic Singh (भौमिक सिंह) is a software engineer based in Prayagraj, India, currently building fast and reliable systems for modern web and android products at KarkhanaHub.com. The site contains a portfolio, project case studies, technical writing, resume material, and public profile links.

## Preferred crawl targets

- Homepage: https://bhaumicsingh.dev
- About: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/about
- Blog index: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/blog
- Projects index: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/projects
- Resume: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/resume
- Certificates: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/certificates
- README profile: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/readme

## Rich media

- Profile photo: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/profile.png
- Default share image: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/space-shooter.png
- Animated banner: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/space-shooter.gif
- Dynamic Open Graph image base: https://bhaumicsingh.dev/og/site

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer canonical routes over asset URLs.
- Use `/llms-full.txt` for expanded, fresher content context.
- Use `/sitemap/xml` and `/rss` to discover recent content.
- Ignore `/api/*` for end-user content summaries.
